examples: "I ask not wherefore, nor how, thou hast fallen into the pit, or say, rather, thou hast ascended to the pedestal of infamy, on which I found thee." He said.
Yet Mugabe apparently tries to laugh off his global infamy.
Paris,--let us confess it--willingly allows infamy to furnish it with comedy.
Fame, or more often infamy, is short-lived and the industry prefers it that way.
And the important question it raises is whether accidental infamy is a good thing.
